label: indigena-mexicano
description: un indigena mexicano en época de la conquista de américa con atuendos de la época

label: Un soldado español del siglo XV
description: Un soldado español del siglo XV con ropa y atuendos de la epoca de la conquista de america

label: mapa america (expresive)
description: A continuous and expressive thinking line depicting the complete silhouette of the Americas from the Arctic north to the tip of Patagonia, featuring the textured ridges of the Andes and Rocky Mountains, accented by a classic nautical compass rose and subtle flowing strokes representing the surrounding oceanic currents.
